title: Metadata Schema for Atlas Vivo MILK
description: Schema for validating metadata.json files in Atlas Vivo MILK main repository

title.description: Title of the project or resource

description.description: Detailed description of the project or resource

license.description: License for the project or resource

keywords.description: Keywords or tags for the project or resource

creators.description: Authors or creators of the project or resource

version.description: Version of the project or resource

datePublished.description: Publication date of the project or resource

doi.description: Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the project or resource
